ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this generation belongs to */,
  "gen" INTEGER /* Generation number */,
  "min_score" REAL /* Minimum score for this generation */,
  "med_score" REAL /* Median score for this generation */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score for this generation */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run this generation belongs to */,
  "mean_score" REAL /* Mean score for this generation */,
  "std_dev_score" REAL /* Standard deviation of the scores in this generation */,
  "num_individuals" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in this generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spearman_correlations" (
  "spearman_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Spearman correlation */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation this correlation belongs to */,
  "coeff" REAL /* Spearman correlation coefficient */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value associated with the Spearman correlation coefficient */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the correlation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spearman_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spearman_correlations_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "convergence_counters" (
  "convergence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each convergence counter */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the generation this counter belongs to */,
  "counter" INTEGER /* Convergence counter value */,
  "convergence_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value used for determining convergence */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the convergence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("convergence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_convergence_counters_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the algorithm (e.g., mutation rate, crossover rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in this run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this run belongs to */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date of the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "size_mb" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for verifying the integrity of the file */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
